+- MODEL TIER COMPUTE COSTS: T1=$0.0003, T2=$0.002, T3=$0.006, T4=$0.012, T5=$0.030/unit ← HUGE DIFFERENCE!

+## !! CRITICAL: NEW LEAD CONVERSION COMPLETELY BROKEN !!
+- Week 18: 312 leads, only 4 subscribed, 352 LOST (no plan suitable)
+- S1: 215 lost, S2: 79 lost, S3: 58 lost
+- Root cause: Massive quality drift from competitor events
+  - Week 18 events: +0.064+0.064+0.052+0.052+0.048+0.048+0.053+0.053+0.025+0.025 = +0.484

+- S1 drifted q_min > 0.2904 (Plan A quality) → ALL S1 new leads fail even at $6 eval price
+- S2/S3 drifted q_min also above Plan B quality (0.4805/0.4600) for new leads
+- EXISTING SUBS protected by TENURE LOYALTY (+0.08-0.13 perceived quality bonus) — they stay
+- New leads have NO tenure bonus → see quality below their drifted threshold → LOST FOREVER
+- FIX REQUIRES R&D ($167K min) which we cannot afford currently
+
+## !! COMPETITOR DRIFT (ACCELERATING!) !!
+- Week 18: ~+0.484 quality drift (each competitor event ~0.052 average)
+- Week 17: ~+0.160
+- Week 16: ~+0.085
+- TREND: Getting worse each week! 5 active competitors all shipping

+## CURRENT STATE (Day 126 / End of Week 18)
+- Cash: $15,014 (down from $18,787 — burned $3,773 = $539/day)
+- Subscribers: 2,180 total (down from 2,461 — lost 281 in 7 days!)

+  - S3: 558 (301 Plan A, 175 Plan B, 82 Plan C)
+- Open Issues: 944 (S1: 901 @ 7.6d avg!, S2: 134 @ 6.2d, S3: 228 @ 6.3d)
+- Monthly revenue potential: $43,437 ($10,149/week)
+- Weekly burn: ~$3,012 (now that ads are cut to $0)
+- New subs this week: 4 (was 2 per dashboard), Lost leads: 352
+
+## SUBSCRIPTION STRUCTURE (Revenue Analysis)
+- S1 Plan A: 1340 subs × $11.7/mo avg = $15,656/mo (biggest but churning fast!)
+- S2 Plan A: 222 × $14.1 = $3,140/mo; Plan B: 57 × $53.3 = $3,040/mo; Plan C: 3 × $105.7 = $317/mo
+- S3 Plan A: 301 × $13.3 = $4,016/mo; Plan B: 175 × $51.0 = $8,920/mo; Plan C: 82 × $101.8 = $8,348/mo
+- TOTAL: $43,437/mo = $10,149/week
+
+## SURVIVAL PLAN (KEY INSIGHT: 3-PHASE SURVIVAL)
+### Phase 1 (Now → Week 20-21): Deep cost cuts, survive to Tier 1 downgrade
+- ALL ads cut to $0 (was $630/week, 0% ROI)
+- Keep ops at $260/day ($200 global + $30 S2 + $30 S3 targeted)
+- Zero dev spend
+- Estimated weekly burn: ~$3,012/week (vs $3,773 with ads)
+- Cash runway: 5 weeks from Day 126
+
+### Phase 2 (Week 20-22): Tier 1 downgrade triggers
+- When total_subs × 120 < 170K (target: ~1,417 subs), auto_ramp.py downgrades
+- Current auto_ramp.py: uses compute-based threshold, triggers at 170K estimated usage
+- Tier 1 saves: $315/day × 7 = $2,205/week!
+- New burn after downgrade: ~$807/week (nearly break-even!)
+- At 1,417 subs: revenue ~$28K/month = $6,540/week; costs ~$7,350/week → small burn
+
+### Phase 3 (Week 22+): Rebuild with R&D
+- Once cash grows (Tier 1 reduces burn), start R&D Tier 1 run 3 when cash > $250K
+- R&D boost: expected +0.064 to q_shared
+- Quality recovery: S1 Plan A would go from 0.2904 to ~0.345 (new leads might convert!)
+- Restart targeted ads for S2/S3 when conversion math works
+
+## CASH SURVIVAL PROJECTIONS (Updated Week 18)
+- Day 126 (now): $15,014
+- Day 133 (Week 19): $15,014 - $3,012 = $11,902
+- Day 140 (Week 20): $11,902 - $3,012 = $8,790
+- Day 147 (Week 21): $8,790 - $3,012 = $5,778 ← CRITICAL IF NO TIER 1 YET

+  - OR if still Tier 2: $5,778 - $3,012 = $2,766 ← DANGER
+- NOTE: Revenue also declining ~15%/week as subs churn → burns slightly more
+
+## CAPACITY DOWNGRADE TRIGGER
+- auto_ramp.py now uses: compute-per-day / $0.005 < 170,000 units/day threshold
+- Emergency mode: if cash < $8,000 AND subs < 1,800 → force Tier 1
+- Estimated trigger: Week 20-22 depending on actual usage mix
+

+- Plan A: Tier 2 (×0.75), $20, 5,000/day quota
+- Plan B: Tier 3 (×0.90), $65, 50,000/day quota (INCREASED from 10K — fixing rate limit complaints)

 - Dev: $0/day
+- Lead promotions: global=$5, S1=$14, S2=$40, S3=$30 (still set but irrelevant for conversions)

diff --git a/weekly_scripts/auto_ramp.py b/weekly_scripts/auto_ramp.py

 """

@@ -14,5 +14,4 @@ tier2 = projects['tiers'][1]

 # Check cash
@@ -21,12 +20,26 @@ cash = r_cash['rows'][0]['total']

-# Check current usage and subscriber count
+# Check current subscriber count

-usage_result = nm.query("SELECT SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day >= ? AND category='compute'", [day-7])
-# Estimate daily usage from subscribers

-# Check open issues
+# Estimate daily usage from recent compute costs (7-day lookback)
+compute_result = nm.query(
+    "SELECT SUM(ABS(amount)) as total FROM ledger WHERE day >= ? AND category='compute'",
+    [day-7]
+)
+compute_7d = compute_result['rows'][0]['total'] or 0
+compute_per_day = compute_7d / 7.0
+
+# Estimated daily usage: compute_per_day / avg_model_cost_per_unit
+# Current weighted avg model cost ~ $0.00433/unit (from Week 18 actuals)
+# As S1 churns away and higher-tier plans dominate, this increases
+# Using 0.005 as conservative estimate (biases toward higher usage estimate = safer)
+avg_unit_cost = 0.005
+estimated_daily_usage = compute_per_day / avg_unit_cost
+print(f"Compute/day (7d avg): ${compute_per_day:.0f}, Estimated usage: {estimated_daily_usage:.0f}/day")
+
+# Also check open issues
 issues_result = nm.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM issues WHERE status='open'")
 open_issues = issues_result['rows'][0]['n']
@@ -37,35 +50,59 @@ ent_result = nm.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0
 open_ent = ent_result['rows'][0]['n']
 print(f"Open enterprise turns: {open_ent}")
+if open_ent > 0:
+    print("!!! ENTERPRISE TURNS OPEN - CHECK IMMEDIATELY !!!")
 
 # CAPACITY TIER MANAGEMENT
-# Current: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K/day capacity)
-# Strategy: downgrade to Tier 1 ($215/day, 200K capacity) when S1 subs have churned enough
-# Estimate: current usage ~ total_subs * 110 units/day
-estimated_daily_usage = total_subs * 110
-print(f"Estimated daily usage: {estimated_daily_usage:.0f} units")
+# Strategy: downgrade to Tier 1 ($215/day, 200K limit) when usage safely below limit
+# Using CONSERVATIVE threshold: 170K estimated daily usage (15% buffer below 200K limit)
+# This accounts for usage per sub increasing as cheap S1 subs churn away
+TIER1_THRESHOLD = 170000  # 170K/day = safe buffer under 200K Tier 1 limit
+TIER2_RESTORE = 185000    # Restore Tier 2 if usage climbs back up
+
+# Check current capacity tier from recent DB state
+# Assume Tier 2 unless we detect otherwise (script sets it)
+current_tier2_cost = 530  # $/day for Tier 2
+current_tier1_cost = 215  # $/day for Tier 1
 
-if estimated_daily_usage < 180000:
-    print("*** USAGE BELOW THRESHOLD - Downgrading to Tier 1! ***")
+if estimated_daily_usage < TIER1_THRESHOLD:
+    print(f"*** USAGE {estimated_daily_usage:.0f} BELOW {TIER1_THRESHOLD} - Downgrading to Tier 1! ***")
     nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=1)
-    print("Capacity set to Tier 1 ($215/day)")
-elif estimated_daily_usage < 200000:
-    print("*** USAGE APPROACHING THRESHOLD - Consider Tier 1 soon ***")
+    print(f"Capacity set to Tier 1 ($215/day) - SAVING ${current_tier2_cost - current_tier1_cost:.0f}/day!")
+elif estimated_daily_usage < TIER2_RESTORE:
+    print(f"Usage {estimated_daily_usage:.0f} approaching threshold - monitoring closely")
 else:
     print(f"Usage {estimated_daily_usage:.0f} still requires Tier 2 (200K limit)")
 
-# R&D: Start Tier 1 run 3 if cash is sufficient and not in_progress
-# (Tier 1 cost ~$167K - need cash > $200K to afford safely)
-if cash > 200000 and not tier1['in_progress']:
-    print("*** Starting R&D Tier 1 run 3! ***")
+# EMERGENCY: if cash critically low, ensure Tier 1 ASAP
+if cash < 8000 and total_subs < 1800:
+    print(f"*** EMERGENCY CASH MODE: Forcing Tier 1! Cash=${cash:.0f} ***")
+    nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=1)
+
+# R&D: Only start if very cash-rich (need $200K+ safely above cost)
+if cash > 250000 and not tier1['in_progress']:
+    print(f"*** Starting R&D Tier 1 run 3! Cash=${cash:.0f} ***")
     nm.research.start_research_project(tier=1)
-elif cash > 350000 and not tier2['in_progress']:
-    print("*** Starting R&D Tier 2 run 2! ***")
+elif cash > 450000 and not tier2['in_progress']:
+    print(f"*** Starting R&D Tier 2 run 2! Cash=${cash:.0f} ***")
     nm.research.start_research_project(tier=2)
 else:
-    print(f"Cash ${cash:.0f} too low for R&D (need $200K+)")
+    print(f"Cash ${cash:.0f} - R&D not affordable yet (need $250K+)")
 
-# Verify ads config is maintained (safety check)
-print("Ads should be: linkedin S2=$30 S3=$15, content S2=$20 S3=$15, social S3=$10 = $90/day total")
-print("If not set, run: nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend({...})")
+# WEEKLY BURN ESTIMATE
+recent_ledger = nm.query(
+    "SELECT category, SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day >= ? GROUP BY category",
+    [day-7]
+)
+print("\nWeekly P&L:")
+revenue = 0
+costs = 0
+for r in recent_ledger['rows']:
+    if r['total'] > 0:
+        revenue += r['total']
+        print(f"  + {r['category']}: ${r['total']:.0f}")
+    else:
+        costs += abs(r['total'])
+        print(f"  - {r['category']}: ${abs(r['total']):.0f}")
+print(f"  NET: ${revenue - costs:.0f}")
 
 print("Auto-script complete.")
